revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=WikiProject_Reliability here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=WikiProject_Reliability for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> ggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggg <!--Shinto Wiki-->[[en:WikiProject Reliability]]]] [[en:WikiProject Reliability]] <!--Shinto Wiki-->[[en:WikiProject Reliability]]]] [[en:WikiProject Reliability]][[en:WikiProject Reliability]]
